prompts.purpose: Generate a compliance explanation for a chosen route, tied to explicit rule outputs (zones avoided, constraints applied).

strategy: model output constrained to provided facts only
reject if output introduces unseen zones or numeric values
rejection_triggers: mentions zones not in restricted_zone_hits or avoided list
adds new numeric values not present in inputs
adds policy claims without a rule id

prompts.example_prompt_text: Using only the provided routing engine facts, explain why the route complies with restricted-zone constraints. Do not introduce new zones, costs, or emissions values. If facts are insufficient, say so and request missing fields.
